description_long: This skateboard features a vibrant green deck with a wide, central orange stripe running lengthwise down the middle. The deck is slightly concave with upturned nose and tail, providing better control and maneuverability. Four purple wheels are attached to the underside via sturdy blue trucks, giving the board a playful and eye-catching appearance. The deck surface appears smooth and lacks visible grip tape, suggesting a clean, minimalistic design. No visible brand logos or deck graphics are present, emphasizing the bold color scheme as the main visual element. The overall build suggests a lightweight, maneuverable board suitable for urban environments like parks, sidewalks, and streets.
description: A green skateboard with a central orange stripe, purple wheels, and blue trucks, featuring a clean, minimalistic design with no visible logos or graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved green deck with a central orange stripe and two visible purple wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the concave shape of the deck, the upturned nose and tail, and all four purple wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the orange stripe centered and two purple wheels visible beneath the deck.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the concave deck profile, upturned ends, and all four purple wheels.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, medium-sized, solid purple, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, low-profile, blue color, no visible branding or unique features
